column1: # Phase 2 adaptive intake eval — 2026-05-02
# Live run on Groq. Median questions_asked target: ≤ 7 (plan §Phase 2 ship gate).
# Result: median = 9 — TARGET MISSED. 8 of 9 fixtures hit MAX_INTAKE_STEPS=9 with 0 inferences.
# Diagnosis (NOT a Groq routing problem — would reproduce on Anthropic the same way):
# The IntakeController treats `simulatedDiscoveryAnswers` as opaque strings written to
# workingMemory.intakeAnswers[] but never extracts them into spec.personas / scenarios /
# nonGoals. As a result deriveCandidateUnknowns() keeps emitting the same candidates and
# blockingScorer (now Groq llama-3.1-8b-instant) keeps scoring them ≥ BLOCKING_THRESHOLD=6
# so every step takes the ASK branch until MAX_INTAKE_STEPS hard-stops the loop.
# Only pp-09 (claude-plugin) hit the INFER branch — its 3rd answer landed below threshold.
# The structured-output reliability test (server/test/baselines/2026-05-02-groq-structured-validity.csv)
# shows Groq emits valid JSON on every call
column2: so this is not a JSON-parsing or schema-shape issue.
